item.title: Anyone else absolutely hate these algorithms on other social media platforms?
item.description: Like just because I watched a video of someone trimming the hooves of a cow doesn’t mean I’m a ranch hand living in Montana looking for tips on how to improve my hoof trimming technique lol. Any time I click on anything on any other social media app, my suggestions go nuts and I have to constantly click on “not interested” or whatever. These algorithms for suggestions are supposed to drive engagement but all it does is annoy the shit out of me. I like Imgur just being random, usersub is great, I can watch whatever nonsense video and the app doesn’t assume I’m a connoisseur of that thing.
item.dc:creator: CapnAdorable

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: just a dump of random witchy and fae things from your local bog creature
item.description:
currently trying to use this as a lifeline to crawl out of a very dark place. the idea is we tend to remove stuff that we can't handle when we're overwhelmed but we frequently forget to replace it with something better. then you're left with a life that's very empty, containing only the most basic things you couldn't get rid of. you can add joy and beauty back into your life in tiny ways so you have something better to focus on
want to come to my party? i'll make cake
oh hey Cernunnos, wuzzup man?
but have we even TRIED sacrificing all the billionaires and CEOs to ancient gods? nothing else seems to be working. let's just throw ONE into a volcano and see if it helps. dip our toe in, ya know?
god do i ever wish
the water inside you was in a thunderstorm last week. you are more weather than flesh
the thing about that story is it includes the little detail that jesus MADE that whip. he sat there for hours braiding leather. i can just picture him muttering under his breath like "fuckin' douchebags, imma strip your skin off, you just wait till i'm done...damnit. no, it's under under OVER. now i have to backtrack and fix it LOOK WHAT YOU ASSHOLES MADE ME DO!"
the forest is my natural habitat. i got home team advantage
today it's getting stoned and watching doctor who and trying to clean my house cause i am FED UP with my entire life
need me a girl to have creepy witchy sex in the woods with
if you lay in the moss long enough it will accept you as one of its own
good hiking companions for me include easily distracted dogs, people who like to forage mushrooms and berries, and fellow ADHD pagans. if you want to *climb this mountain by noon* i'm not coming
i put a little witch hat on my cat. this is a legit threat
good fun. this is your reminder to go outside for a few min, even if you just open a window and stick your head out or stand on your front porch with a cup of tea for 5 min. you'll feel better for it. promise. love you all
item.dc:creator: spiritussancto
